case_title: AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM, LLC VS. LASHEA RUSSELL ET AL

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL, LASHEA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-19-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-16-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-27-2015

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-17-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-30-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100003057) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL, LASHEA
